rules.reason: Existing public Supabase migrations may rely on active platform context and are not auto-applied to the disposable service-schema database.

entries.reason: Consolidated local-only Game Engine schema baseline for disposable database validation.
Consolidated local-only Auth Service schema baseline for disposable database validation.
Adds durable evaluation tables after the consolidated Game Engine baseline so the draft conflict is not applied blindly.
Adds local-only indexes required by database-backed Game Engine evaluation repositories.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service signing key storage for JWT/JWKS runtime validation.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service refresh-token storage for rotation, revocation, replay detection, and session binding.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service service-account/client-secret storage for service-to-service token issuance validation.
Adds local-only durable Settlement Service run and append-only record storage for recovery-safe validation.
Adds local-only durable, idempotent settlement ledger effects without enabling financial posting authority.
Adds local-only cashier, wallet, ledger, outbox, and atomic completion RPC surfaces for disposable financial completion validation.
Adds local-only durable financial worker event handling records for idempotent consumer validation.
Adds local-only Credit Wallet read baseline tables and summary RPC for durable service read validation without enabling credit service authority.
Adds local-only durable reserve and release RPCs for Credit Wallet Service mutation validation while CREDIT authority remains MONOLITH.
Adds local-only durable settlement application RPC for Credit Wallet Service mutation validation while CREDIT authority remains MONOLITH.
Replaces the local-only Credit Wallet settlement application RPC with fully qualified references so idempotent replay is deterministic.
Adds append-only local Game Manifest v1 and authority certificate chain storage for Outcome Authority governance contracts.
Adds append-only local Outcome DSL v1 strategy definition storage with primitive validation and forbidden math/paytable/RTP guards.
Adds append-only local Math Model v1 and Paytable v1 governance storage with RTP, payout, and forbidden RNG/outcome guards.
Corrects Math/Paytable governance so jurisdiction and certification are optional policy overlays, not required dependencies.
Adds append-only local production RNG provider contract and health/evidence storage without enabling outcome generation.
Adds append-only local dry-run Outcome Authority event and certificate storage while production outcome authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only local dry-run Math Authority evaluation event and certificate storage without financial settlement or ledger posting.
Adds append-only local Certification Pack v1 authority-chain export storage without enabling production signing or authority activation.
Adds append-only signing provider and certificate signature evidence storage without enabling production signing keys.
Adds append-only statistical validation and simulation evidence storage without enabling production Outcome Authority.
Adds append-only outcome custody and operational control evidence without enabling production Outcome Authority.
Adds append-only local Platform Management Foundation hierarchy storage for organizations, tenants, brands, and markets.
Adds append-only local website/domain management storage and active host-resolution foundation without DNS or routing automation.
Adds append-only local brand theme and asset reference storage without UI, uploads, CDN, or object storage integration.
Adds append-only local game availability matrix storage and effective-date-aware resolution without Game Engine activation.
Seeds durable Auth Service platform-management permission catalog and role governance metadata without redesigning RBAC.
Adds append-only lifecycle events, version supersession metadata, and lifecycle-aware platform resolution without update/delete endpoints.
Adds append-only Outcome Provider contracts and immutable Game Manifest provider bindings without enabling production outcome authority.
Adds append-only certified CSPRNG, entropy provider, and DRBG session evidence contracts without enabling production outcome generation.
Adds append-only Provably Fair provider, commit-reveal governance, nonce, and player verification receipt contracts without enabling production gameplay.
Adds append-only Outcome Provider runtime request and attempt evidence boundaries with advisory-lock support while production outcome generation remains disabled.
Allows durable fail-closed Outcome Provider runtime evidence when exact provider resolution fails, while preserving production generation disablement.
Allows accepted Certified CSPRNG dry-run/simulation runtime attempts while preserving production generation disablement and secret-material rejection.
Adds append-only Provably Fair runtime receipt, reveal, verification evidence, and dry-run attempt support while production authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only External Official Result source, schema mapping, ingestion, verification evidence, and dry-run attempt support while production authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only Physical Draw authority, event, witness, equipment, custody evidence, and dry-run attempt support while production authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only Outcome Authority runtime boot identities, provenance stamps, recovery evidence, and rollback-detection support while production authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only cryptographic conformance, statistical validation framework, provider registry, and certification readiness evidence without enabling production Outcome Authority.
Adds append-only rollback watermark evidence for Outcome Authority recovery, PITR, and provenance regression detection while production authority remains disabled.
Adds durable Math Evaluation request and append-only attempt evidence for certificate-based Math Authority idempotency, retry, and replay while production remains disabled.
Adds durable Math Evaluation batch, item, and append-only attempt evidence for certificate-based batch execution and recovery without financial effects.
Adds append-only canonical SettlementInput handoff artifacts derived only from Math Evaluation Certificates without settlement, ledger, wallet, commission, tax, or cashier effects.

Adds durable SettlementInput ingestion requests and append-only attempt evidence for binding Math Authority handoff artifacts to accepted wager financial context without settlement execution or financial effects.

Adds append-only authoritative SettlementRecords and execution attempt evidence derived only from canonical SettlementInput ingestion requests without ledger, credit, commission, tax, cashier, or reconciliation effects.
Adds append-only Financial Instruction state machine artifacts generated from authoritative SettlementRecords while Ledger and Credit Wallet posting remain disabled.
Adds append-only Financial Instruction execution evidence for idempotent Ledger and Credit Wallet target calls without distributed transactions, commissions, taxes, cashier logic, or reconciliation.

Adds append-only Settlement recovery, resume, unknown-result verification, and instruction-level reconciliation evidence without accounting reconciliation, commissions, taxes, cashier logic, or distributed transactions.

Adds append-only resettlement requests, compensating reversal/correction chain records, and lifecycle evidence without mutating original SettlementInput-backed records or producing cashier, tax, commission, or accounting reconciliation effects.
Adds append-only Settlement Authority promotion dry-run evidence and guardrail rehearsal records while production SERVICE authority remains disabled.
Adds canonical request hash binding to durable Ledger postings so same idempotency key with different payload fails closed.
Drops the legacy 9-argument Ledger posting overload after the canonical request hash signature is installed to avoid ambiguous RPC calls.
Makes financial ledger entries database-immutable and adds conflict-safe, hash-bound, reversal-only correction evidence with one reversal per original entry.
Preserves the existing Settlement Service dry-run SETTLEMENT_REVERSAL instruction contract while retaining fail-closed rejection of arbitrary standalone reversal postings.
Adds durable Ledger posting requests, append-only attempt evidence, unknown-result recovery state, and deterministic replay evidence without creating a second financial posting path.
Keeps invalid requested wallet, account, and reversal target identifiers as auditable evidence while preserving the foreign key on a proven completed Ledger entry.
Adds the minimal immutable two-line balanced journal required for credit-only launch, linked to existing durable posting requests and financial Ledger entries.
Adds the immutable versioned credit-only launch posting catalog and binds balanced journals to exact posting rule versions.
Adds the narrow durable posting RPC and transaction allowlist for approved commission, rebate, and promotion catalog instructions.
Adds immutable Ledger recovery and minimal instruction-level Settlement/Ledger/Credit reconciliation evidence.
Adds append-only Ledger Authority readiness and promotion rehearsal evidence while production SERVICE authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only final Ledger Authority verification evidence and deterministic readiness fingerprints without activating SERVICE authority.

Adds immutable Wallet Instrument definitions, tenant/brand/player wallet scope, conflict-safe canonical operation requests, attempts, terminal evidence, and Credit Wallet database invariants without promoting authority.

Completes canonical reservation release, cancellation, and capture transitions with exact scope, wallet-status enforcement, authoritative settlement-instruction uniqueness, exposure invariants, and append-only evidence without promoting authority.
Allows explicitly instructed zero-balance-impact reservation capture while retaining canonical scope, instruction identity, and instrument validation.
Preserves the existing monolith settlement RPC for legacy reservations while keeping canonical reservation states and projection mutation strict.
Derives deterministic legacy settlement instruction evidence for the existing monolith RPC without weakening canonical caller requirements.
Adds authenticated Settlement provenance, completed-Ledger coordination, deterministic cross-authority references, and immutable wallet reversal/correction chains without promoting authority.
Adds append-only wallet recovery, deterministic replay, projection verification, and Ledger/Settlement reconciliation evidence without authority promotion or projection repair.
Adds append-only Credit Wallet readiness, guardrail, blocker, promotion rehearsal, and rollback rehearsal evidence without switching production authority or mutating wallet state.
Repairs cross-authority identity reconciliation and adds closed weekly accounting-period enforcement without changing financial authority defaults.
Adds canonical tenant-scoped identities, Argon2id-only credential history, single-session authority, lifecycle evidence, and immutable authentication audit without promoting AUTH_AUTHORITY.
Phase 22.6A draft only; intentionally excluded from automatic execution.
Superseded for local disposable application by scripts/migrations/local/003_add_game_engine_evaluation_storage.sql.
Phase 23.2 draft only; consolidated local-only migration is used for disposable validation.

knownConflicts.resolution: Both drafts are excluded from automatic execution; local migrations create baseline tables first and add the evaluation storage shape once.
